S

save(Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.SavedataHandler
Saves the specified player to the save data file.
SavedataHandler - Klasse in controller
Utility class for saving and loading player save data.
ScrollBarUI - Klasse in view.utils
A custom implementation of BasicScrollBarUI that provides a styled appearance for Swing scroll bars.
ScrollBarUI() - Konstruktor für Klasse view.utils.ScrollBarUI
 
setCordinates(int, int) - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Updates the player's coordinates by the given delta values.
setDungeonPanel(DungeonPanel) - Methode in Klasse view.gamewindow.GameWindow
Sets the dungeon rendering panel.
setGameIsRunning(boolean) - Methode in Klasse view.GameFrame
Updates the game running state.
setGameWindow(GameWindow) - Methode in Klasse view.GameFrame
Sets the active game window.
setHealth(int) - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Entity
Sets the current health of this entity.
setHealth(int) - Methode in Klasse view.utils.HealthBar
Updates the current health value and repaints the component.
setHealthBar(HealthBar) - Methode in Klasse view.gamewindow.GameWindow
Sets the player's health bar.
setMaxHealth(int) - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Entity
Sets the maximum health of this entity.
setMaxHealth(int) - Methode in Klasse view.utils.HealthBar
Updates the maximum health value and repaints the component.
setOn(boolean) - Methode in Klasse view.utils.ToggleButton
Sets the state of this toggle button.
setPauseMenuBar(JMenuBar) - Methode in Klasse view.GameFrame
Sets the pause menu bar.
setPlayer(Game, Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.GameController
Sets the current player for the game.
setWindow(GameWindow) - Methode in Klasse view.GameFrame
Sets the active game window.
showCard(String) - Methode in Klasse view.GameFrame
Shows a specific screen (card) in the UI.
showDialog(BattleView, List<EnemyPanel>) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.battle.AttackSelectionDialog
Opens the dialog and returns the selected enemy after the user confirms.
showDialog(BattleView, Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.battle.ConsumableSelectionJDialog
Opens the consumable selection dialog and returns the selected item.
showDialog(GameFrame, String, String) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.utils.PopupDialog
Displays a popup dialog that automatically closes after 1 second.
showDialog(OptionScreen, boolean) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.pausemenu.ExitConfirmationDialog
Displays the exit confirmation dialog and waits for user input.
showDialog(StatusScreen, Game, Itemtype) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.pausemenu.EquipmentSelectionDialog
Displays the equipment selection dialog and waits for user input.
showTutorial(GameFrame) - Statische Methode in Klasse view.TutorialDialog
Displays the tutorial dialog modally.
SideBorder - Klasse in view.utils
A custom border that paints vertical white lines on one or both sides of a Swing component.
SideBorder(int) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.utils.SideBorder
Creates a new SideBorder with the specified side configuration.
SOUTH - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse model.dungeon.Direction
Represents the south direction.
SpriteImagePanel - Klasse in view.utils
A panel that displays a sprite image.
SpriteImagePanel(String, boolean) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.utils.SpriteImagePanel
Creates a new SpriteImagePanel and loads the sprite image from the specified file path.
StatsPanel - Klasse in view.pausemenu
A panel that displays the player's statistics inside the status screen.
StatsPanel(Game) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.pausemenu.StatsPanel
Creates a new statistics panel for the given game instance.
STATUS - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GameFrame
Identifier for the status screen.
StatusScreen - Klasse in view.pausemenu
A UI panel that represents the player's status screen.
StatusScreen(GameFrame, Game) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.pausemenu.StatusScreen
Creates a new status screen displaying the player's stats, character image, and equipment information.
